info.name: Factset Basic Search for Instruments.

params.name: _attributes
params.description: Limit the attributes returned in the response to the specified set.

params.name: _paginationOffset
params.description: Non-negative number of entries to skip, or 0 (default).

params.name: _paginationLimit
params.description: Non-negative maximum number of entries to return.

items.docs: Search for instruments whose ISIN, specified NSINs, or name match the search value according to a tolerant full-text match algorithm. Better matching results appear in the response before less relevant matches.

info.name: Factset Basic Search for Notations.

params.name: _attributes
params.description: Limit the attributes returned in the response to the specified set.

params.name: _paginationOffset
params.description: Non-negative number of entries to skip, or 0 (default).

params.name: _paginationLimit
params.description: Non-negative maximum number of entries to return.

items.docs: Search for a notation whose ISIN, specified NSINs, name, or symbol match the search value according to a tolerant full-text match algorithm. If more than one notation of an instrument matches, only the notation with the highest monetary trading volume, averaged over one month, is considered. Better matching results appear in the response before less relevant matches. If the parameter popularity is set to true, the popularity of the notation is the primary sort criterion. Popularity is affected m

info.name: Retrieve a List of Notations for a Given Factset Identifier.

items.docs:
Retrieve a list of notations for a given FactSet identifier, grouped by regional identifiers, if available. Listings without a regional identifier are grouped at the end of the response.

The notation corresponding to the security's primary listing has the attributes regional.isPrimary and regional.listing.isPrimary both set to true.The security's primary listing might not be among the results depending on the entitlement.

See the group descr

info.name: Retrieve a List of Factset Identifiers for a Given Instrument.

items.docs:
Retrieve a list of FactSet identifiers for a given instrument, grouped by regional identifiers, if available. Listings without a regional identifier are grouped at the end of the response.

The notation corresponding to the security's primary listing has the attributes regional.isPrimary and regional.listing.isPrimary both set to true.The security's primary listing might not be among the results depending on the entitlement.

The result contai

info.name: Coupons
Factset List of Coupons for an Interest-bearing Instrument.

params.name: _attributes
params.description: Limit the attributes returned in the response to the specified set.

items.docs:
List of coupons for an interest-bearing instrument; any other instrument yields empty values. The endpoint provides details regarding the coupon period, the respective interest rate, and payable amount (the latter only for instruments with a fixed nominal value). The list of coupons is generally not available for a perpetual, i.e. without a predefined maturity date, interst-bearing instrument. 

If there is no entitled provider supplying a full list of coupons, the list will be synthesized from

info.name: Exchange
Factset Retrieve an Exchange Rate Instrument Identifier.

params.name: _attributes
params.description: Limit the attributes returned in the response to the specified set.

items.docs:
Retrieve an exchange rate instrument identifier using the identifier of the main currencies represented by that exchange rate. 

 An error is returned if one of the provided parameters is invalid or if no instrument is associated with the given combination of parameters.

info.name: Code
Factset Retrieve an Exchange Rate Instrument Identifier.

params.name: _attributes
params.description: Limit the attributes returned in the response to the specified set.

items.docs:
Retrieve an exchange rate instrument identifier using the ISO 4217 code of the main currencies represented by that exchange rate. 

An error is returned if one of the provided parameters is invalid or if no instrument is associated with the given combination of parameters.

info.name: Factset List of Entitled Notations.

items.docs: List of entitled notations. Symbols are not globally unique; therefore, a given symbol interpreted in different markets might refer to different instruments.

info.name: Factset Intraday Trading Status of a Notation.

params.name: _attributes
params.description: Limit the attributes returned in the response to the specified set.

params.name: _subscriptionMinimumInterval
params.description: Minimum number of milliseconds at which updates are sent.

items.docs:
Intraday trading status of a notation.
The endpoint is subscribable to provide push updates. See attribute `_subscriptionMinimalInterval` for valid update rates.

info.name: Factset Text-based Search for Notations.

items.docs:
Text-based search for notations in selected identifier and name attributes according to a tolerant full-text match algorithm. The results satisfy all selected filters; sorting by various attributes is possible. If more than one notation of an instrument matches, only the notation with the best market priority (according to the parameter `market.priority`) or, in the absence of market priorities, only the notation with the highest trading volume, averaged over one month, is considered.     
 All

info.name: Date
Factset End-of-day (eod) Key Figures for the Time Range Year-to-date (ytd)..

params.name: _attributes
params.description: Limit the attributes returned in the response to the specified set.

items.docs: End-of-day (EOD) key figures for the time range year-to-date (YTD). The time range YTD begins with the last trading day of the previous calendar year for which EOD prices are available and ends with the most recent trading day of the current calendar year for which EOD prices are available..

info.name: Factset End-of-day (eod) Key Figures for the Time Range Year-to-date (ytd), for a List of Notations..

params.name: _attributes
params.description: Limit the attributes returned in the response to the specified set.

items.docs: End-of-day (EOD) key figures for the time range year-to-date (YTD), for a list of notations. The time range YTD begins with the last trading day of the previous calendar year for which EOD prices are available and ends with the most recent tradingday of the current calendar year for which EOD prices are available..

params.name: _attributes
params.description: Limit the attributes returned in the response to the specified set.

items.docs: Average end-of-day (EOD) key figures for different trading days periods. A trading day is a calendar day on that trading of the notation was possible.

info.name: Market
Factset List of Markets With Entitled Notations.

items.docs:
List of markets with entitled notations. The list contains only markets with at least one active and entitled notation. 
All identifiers used as parameters must be valid and entitled.

info.name: List
Factset Set of Custom Notation-level Selection Lists.

params.name: _attributes
params.description: Limit the attributes returned in the response to the specified set.

items.docs: Set of custom notation-level selection lists.

info.name: Factset for Each Given Notation, Returns the Notation-level Selection Lists of Which the Notation Is a Member.

items.docs: For each given notation, returns the notation-level selection lists of which the notation is a member.

info.name: Members
Factset List of Notations Belonging to a Notation-level Selection List.

items.docs: List of notations belonging to a notation-level selection list.

info.name: Prices
Factset Overview of Trading on the Most Recent Trading Day, Including the Latest Price, for a Notation.

params.name: _attributes
params.description: Limit the attributes returned in the response to the specified set.

params.name: _subscriptionMinimumInterval
params.description: Minimum number of milliseconds at which updates are sent.

items.docs:
Overview of trading on the most recent trading day, including the latest price, for a notation.

The endpoint is subscribable to provide push updates. See attribute `_subscriptionMinimalInterval` for valid update rates.

info.name: Factset Overview of Trading on the Most Recent Trading Day, Including the Latest Price, for a List of Notations.

params.name: _attributes
params.description: Limit the attributes returned in the response to the specified set.

items.docs: Overview of trading on the most recent trading day, including the latest price, for a list of notations.

info.name: Factset Full Orderbook

params.name: _attributes
params.description: Limit the attributes returned in the response to the specified set.

params.name: _subscriptionMinimumInterval
params.description: Non-negative number of milliseconds to throttle the update rate.

items.docs: Full orderbook

info.name: Factset Sequence of Market-related Events.

items.docs:
Sequence of market-related events like the opening time or closing time of a market of a specific notation.

Pagination to a previous page is not supported and `pagination.previous` is always `null`.

info.name: Factset Trading Schedule Event Types.

params.name: _attributes
params.description: Limit the attributes returned in the response to the specified set.

items.docs: Trading schedule event types define the events which may occur during any period of trading. Types of trading schedule events are for instance OPEN, CLOSE, END_OF_DAY.
